metadata.description: Meaningfy company-wide skills, agents, methodologies, and engineering standards for working with LLM agents consistently

plugins.name: meaningfy-consulting
plugins.description: Semantic-technologies consulting coaching (engagement design, pricing, B2B/B2G situations). Sales/discovery skills (decision-package, proposal-writing, estimation) land here as they are authored.

plugins.name: meaningfy-communication
plugins.description: Executive and technical communication: Governing Thought, SCQA, Minto, MECE, and clear docs/docstrings

plugins.name: meaningfy-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering standards: new-repo scaffolding (project-setup), clean layered Python (cosmic-python), system architecture (+ conceptual modelling as it lands), and Meaningfy git/PR workflow

plugins.name: meaningfy-ai-coding
plugins.description: Documentation-first AI-assisted development helpers: EPIC planning, clarity gate, BDD, and code-review checklist (pairs with the external stream-coding + superpowers skills and the OpenSpec spine — see docs/environment-setup.md)

plugins.name: meaningfy-spine
plugins.description: Meta-bundle: the reliable product-development spine. Installs the lifecycle-driving skills as a working set; the durable OpenSpec spine assets (openspec/ + spine/) are projected into repos by project-setup. See spine/meaningfy-spine-bundle.md.
